content.text:
### Ran Playwright code
```js
await page.goto('https://yahoo.com');
```
### Page
- Page URL: https://consent.yahoo.com/v2/collectConsent?sessionId=3_cc-session_c1b74e56-d46e-4c0e-a728-f858d73de082
- Page Title: Your privacy choices
### Snapshot

- generic [ref=e5]:
  - banner [ref=e8]:
    - generic [ref=e11]:

        - heading "guce" [level=1] [ref=e13]

          - /url: https://uk.yahoo.com/
          - img [ref=e15]
          - text: guce
      - toolbar
  - generic [ref=e16]:
    - generic [ref=e17]:
      - generic [ref=e18]:
        - paragraph [ref=e19]: Your privacy is important to us
        - paragraph [ref=e20]:
          - text: Yahoo is part of the
          - generic "Yahoo family of brands" [ref=e21]
          - text: .
        - generic [ref=e22]:
          - text: When you use our sites and apps, we use
          - generic "Cookies" [ref=e23]: cookies
          - text: "to:"
        - list [ref=e24]:
          - listitem [ref=e25]: provide our sites and apps to you
          - listitem [ref=e26]: authenticate users, apply security measures, and prevent spam and abuse, and
          - listitem [ref=e27]:
            - generic "Measurement" [ref=e28]: measure
            - text: your use of our sites and apps
      - generic [ref=e29]:
        - generic [ref=e30]: Your privacy choices
        - generic [ref=e31]:
          - text: If you click '
          - strong [ref=e32]: Accept all
          - text: "', we and"
          - link "our partners" [ref=e33] [cursor=pointer]:
            - /url: /v2/partners-list?sessionId=3_cc-session_c1b74e56-d46e-4c0e-a728-f858d73de082
          - text: ", including 245 who are part of the IAB Transparency & Consent Framework, will also store and / or access information on a device (in other words, use cookies) and use precise geolocation data and other personal data such as"
          - generic "Technical identifiers" [ref=e34]: technical identifiers
          - text: and browsing and search data, for analytics, personalised advertising and content, advertising and content measurement, and audience research and services development.
        - paragraph [ref=e35]:
          - text: If you do not want us and our partners to use cookies and personal data for these additional purposes, click '
          - strong [ref=e36]: Reject all
          - text: "'."
        - paragraph [ref=e37]:
          - text: If you would like to customise your choices, click '
          - strong [ref=e38]: Manage privacy settings
          - text: "'."
        - paragraph [ref=e39]:
          - text: You can withdraw your consent or change your choices at any time by clicking on the 'Privacy and Cookie settings' or 'Privacy dashboard' links on our sites and apps. Find out more about how we use your personal data in our
          - link "Privacy Policy" [ref=e40] [cursor=pointer]:
            - /url: /redirect?to=https%3A%2F%2Flegal.yahoo.com%2Fie%2Fen%2Fyahoo%2Fprivacy%2Findex.html&brandDomain=&brandId=yahoo&tos=eu&step=&sessionId=3_cc-session_c1b74e56-d46e-4c0e-a728-f858d73de082&userType=NON_REG
          - text: and
          - link "Cookie Policy" [ref=e41] [cursor=pointer]:
            - /url: /redirect?to=https%3A%2F%2Flegal.yahoo.com%2Fie%2Fen%2Fyahoo%2Fprivacy%2Fcookies%2Findex.html&brandDomain=&brandId=yahoo&tos=eu&step=&sessionId=3_cc-session_c1b74e56-d46e-4c0e-a728-f858d73de082&userType=NON_REG
          - text: .
    - generic [ref=e42]:

      - button "Reject all" [ref=e44] [cursor=pointer]
      - button "Manage privacy settings" [ref=e45] [cursor=pointer]
